name: The Escapement
description: A planet-sized machine cracked open to the sky, its interior a world of interlocked gears the size of towns, snapped mainsprings, and burning oil fens. Most of the works have seized with rust, but a few still grind through their thousand-year rotations. Everything ticks, slow and out of rhythm, tended by things that no longer know what they were built for.
mood: Vast, patient, and mechanical. The grinding half-life of an engine that has outlived its purpose and keeps turning anyway.
biome: rusted gear plains split by mainspring canyons and burning oil fens

enemies.name: Cog Crawler
enemies.role: weak fast melee that swarms in numbers
enemies.description: A dog-sized brass automaton skittering on gear-tooth legs.

enemies.name: Ratchet Hound
enemies.role: fast melee pack that closes distance quickly
enemies.description: A four-legged iron automaton with a ratcheting, clicking gait.

enemies.name: Winder Acolyte
enemies.role: fragile ranged that lobs oil flasks
enemies.description: A robed cultist with a satchel of sloshing oil flasks.

enemies.name: Chime Bat
enemies.role: flying melee that dives on soft targets
enemies.description: A small clockwork bat with thin brass wings that ring in flight.

enemies.name: Winder Zealot
enemies.role: sturdy melee that swings a heavy spanner
enemies.description: A cultist in oil-stained robes hefting an iron cranking-spanner.

enemies.name: Watchman
enemies.role: durable frontline melee with a halberd
enemies.description: A brass humanoid automaton standing guard with a long halberd.

enemies.name: Rivet Gunner
enemies.role: ranged attacker that fires rivets in bursts
enemies.description: A squat automaton with a clattering rivet-cannon for an arm.

enemies.name: Brass Guard
enemies.role: armored blocker that shields nearby allies
enemies.description: A broad iron automaton behind a riveted tower shield.

enemies.name: Winder Priest
enemies.role: support that heals and hastens cult allies
enemies.description: A tall cultist turning a great brass key set into its own back.

enemies.name: Piston Golem
enemies.role: slow heavy bruiser with crushing single hits
enemies.description: A hulking automaton with massive piston-driven arms.

enemies.name: Steam Lancer
enemies.role: fast charger that lances across the field
enemies.description: A sleek automaton balanced on one wheel, trailing steam and couching a lance.

enemies.name: Sweeper
enemies.role: melee that sweeps and damages several tiles at once
enemies.description: A wide, low engine dragging a spinning blade arm that throws sparks.

enemies.name: Shepherd Engine
enemies.role: huge high-HP boss that sweeps whole rows as debris
enemies.description: A mountain-tall walking engine with plow-arms that clear everything before it.

enemies.name: Foreman
enemies.role: boss that summons and repairs automatons
enemies.description: A many-armed overseer automaton clutching stone work-order tablets.

enemies.name: Winder Prophet
enemies.role: boss that sacrifices minions to heal itself and buffs the cult
enemies.description: A gaunt cultist crowned in gears, feeding acolytes to a churning spring.

enemies.name: Coil Colossus
enemies.role: long-range boss that lashes with spring-steel whips
enemies.description: A giant assembled from snapped mainsprings, uncoiling steel lashes.

items.name: Brass Sword
items.description: A short blade cast from salvaged brass.

items.name: Ratchet Saber
items.description: A saw-toothed blade that grinds through armor.

items.name: Cinder Sword
items.description: A blade kept burning in oil-fen flame.

items.name: Mainspring Blade
items.description: A whip-thin blade of coiled spring-steel.

items.name: Piston Lance
items.description: A spring-driven head that punches forward on the thrust.

items.name: Hook Pike
items.description: A barbed head on a winch that drags enemies in.

items.name: Rivet Bow
items.description: A crossbow that fires salvaged rivets.

items.name: Coil Crossbow
items.description: A wound-spring bow with a brutal draw.

items.name: Coil Staff
items.description: Discharges stored spring-force in a shove.

items.name: Gear Maul
items.description: A town-gear tooth mounted on a heavy haft.

items.name: Flywheel Axe
items.description: A spinning weighted axe head that keeps its momentum.

items.name: Piston Hammer
items.description: A steam-driven maul that slams for enormous force.
